entity.summary: Philippine centralized crypto trading and financial-services platform providing spot markets with live order books, professional exchange access, crypto purchases and sales, institutional trading services, wallets, and payment functionality.
entity.notes: Current first-party pages identify Coins.ph as a Philippine crypto brand launched in 2014, regulated by the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas, and offering active spot trading with live order books plus Coins Pro and API access. The launch date uses a month-level source normalized to the first day of January 2014.

evidence.title: About Coins.ph
evidence.notes: First-party About page states that Coins.ph launched in 2014, identifies it as an established Philippine crypto brand, describes buy and sell functionality, and states Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas regulation.

evidence.title: Coins.ph trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes Spot trading with live order books, Markets, institutional OTC/FX, Coins Pro professional exchange access, crypto exchange services, and current login and signup flows.

evidence.title: Coins.ph API Docs
evidence.notes: Current first-party developer hub publishes API documentation, reference material, product and service documentation, integration guides, and a changelog for Coins.ph services.
